# configurationItems()

**Instance Method**

Returns configuration items to display in the compose view.

## Declaration

```swift
func configurationItems() -> [Any]!
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.social/documentation/Social/SLComposeSheetConfigurationItem] objects, or `nil` if no configuration items need to be displayed.

## Discussion

Implement this method if you need to display configuration items, such as an account picker or privacy indicator, in your compose view.

## Configuring the Post Details

- **SLComposeSheetConfigurationItem**: An object that provides additional configuration details to use when configuring a composition interface.
- **reloadConfigurationItems()**: Reloads the list of configuration items.
